commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/dag_branch_locks.py tests/test_dag_branch_locks.py
uv run pytest tests/test_dag_branch_locks.py tests/test_dag_expansion.py tests/test_dag_route_memory.py tests/test_project_dag.py -q

proves: tau.dag_branch_locks.v1 validation rejects provider or mutating branches whose locks omit authorization metadata.
Branch locks now require actor_identity, approval_packet_sha256, allowed_paths, side_effect_class, expires_at, and rollback_policy before scheduling.
Provider branch locks require a workspace_lease reference.
Expired locks, unsupported side_effect_class values, missing allowed_paths, and rollback_policy values other than 'required' fail closed.
The slice does not execute provider branches, mutating branches, route mutation, DAG mutation, or Memory sync.
does_not_prove: That approval_packet_sha256 points to a valid human approval packet.
Concurrent scheduling of provider or mutating branches.
Herdr workspace lease creation or cleanup.
next_recommended_route: Continue P1 with explicit Herdr workspace lease receipts or approval-packet hash binding.
